response.justification: The candidate comfortably exceeds the 15-year experience minimum and shows strong software craftsmanship across web, backend, and systems work, including recent hands-on AI-agent tooling (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks). However, the role is a director-level IC focused on AI strategy, and the resume demonstrates senior/staff-level product engineering rather than recognized AI expertise, shipped AI products or platforms at scale, or strategic influence across engineering organizations. Cloud experience is present but incidental (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) rather than platform-strategy depth, making the gap to the role's core expectations substantial.
strengths: 19+ years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Entrepreneurial track record: founded and maintains an open-source geo-data platform used in production by a real organization
Strong engineering-culture contributions: TDD, workshops, courses, conference talks, and multiple open-source libraries
concerns: No demonstrated director/principal-level scope: roles are senior/staff IC on feature teams, not org-wide technical strategy
AI experience is recent and tooling-oriented; no recognized AI expertise, research, or AI-powered products with measurable outcomes
Cloud experience is application-level rather than the cloud platform strategy and advisory depth the role centers on

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs. director-level IC role
Long, broad engineering experience meeting minimum bar
